title: A proposal for a qualitative analysis of the media discourse on the bombing of Yugoslavia
author: Pérez Rastrilla, Laura
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: In this chapter I present the analysis framework that I developed during my doctoral thesis for the study of media discourses on the 1999 bombing of Yugoslavia (Pérez Rastrilla, 2018). I explain the procedure followed, with a detailed account of the steps and some examples of the results obtained. The research carried out was framed within the studies of communication and propaganda and aimed to know the strategies and narrative techniques that legitimised the representation of the bombing of Yugoslavia in the Spanish media.
steps_raw: In this chapter I present the analysis framework that I developed during my doctoral thesis for the study of media discourses on the 1999 bombing of Yugoslavia (Pérez Rastrilla, 2018).
